title: anotis microphylla
intro: Anotis microphylla, also known as "False Boldo", is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in South America. Its medicinal properties lie in its leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues and alleviating pain. The health benefits of Anotis microphylla include its ability to soothe stomach ulcers, reduce fever, and provide relief from rheumatic pain. Anotis microphylla can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be made by drying and crushing the leaves to extract their medicinal compounds.
